scope: wave2 fan-out migration: the 2 top-level legacy-parity read streams (brands, users) only; the brand-scoped substreams (contacts, lists, custom fields) require a per-brand sub-resource fan-out read the Tier-1 declarative dialect cannot express (see docs.md Known limits) and are blocked pending a Tier-2 StreamHook in a follow-up wave
